ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Updated flow write step to include deterministic single-sequence capture plus post-capture error/status queries issued via *WAI followed by ALLEV? and *ESR?; ensured disconnect params match TekAutomate schema.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_step","targetStepId":"2","newStep":{"id":"2","type":"write","label":"Write ACQuire single-sequence + post-capture status/errors","params":{"command":"*CLS;ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence;ACQuire:STATE RUN;*WAI;ALLEV?;*ESR?"}}},{"type":"replace_step","targetStepId":"3","newStep":{"id":"3","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["MSO6B"]}}}]}
